title: salvia urticifolia var. longifolia
intro: Salvia urticifolia var. longifolia, also known as Long-leaved Sage or Meadow Sage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Salvia urticifolia var. longifolia has been reported to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies and folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
